title: The Hamburger Mod
description: Your one and only stop for the best hamburgers and related items for Minecraft!
body:
The Hamburger Mod introduces hamburgers and other items related to fast food or hamburgers.
# Current Items
- Hamburger
- Hamburger Bun
- The Ham of Burger (Painting)
# Upcoming/ Planned Items
- Fries
- Ketchup
- Burger Block
- Soda (Possibly Multiple Flavors)
- Cheeseburger
- Cheese
- Lettuce
- Wiener (For Corn and Hot Dog)
- Hot Dog
- Hot Dog Bun
- Corn Dog
- Deepfryer (For Corn Dog)
- Corn Dog Batter
